Chunk it: Okay, / I'm so sleepy.
Chunk it: Don't go anywhere.
Chunk it: I bought a ticket.
Chunk it: I am not going anywhere.
Chunk it: Seat belts on?
Chunk it: Good.
Chunk it: Are we almost there?
Chunk it: Almost.
Chunk it: Lisa.
Chunk it: Yes?

items.line_en: Thank you for holding my hand.

coach.say: Thank you for holding my hand.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you for holding my hand.
Chunk it: I was scared.

items.line_en: I didn't want to be scared alone.

coach.say: I didn't want to be scared alone.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I didn't want to be scared alone.
Chunk it: You were not alone.

items.line_en: Daniel, do you have your emergency contact paper?

coach.say: Daniel, do you have your emergency contact paper?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Daniel, / do you have your emergency contact paper?

items.line_en: When you are not okay, you are allowed to say that.

coach.say: When you are not okay, you are allowed to say that.
coach.hint: Chunk it: When you are not okay, / you are allowed to say that.

items.line_en: You don't have to take care of everything.

coach.say: You don't have to take care of everything.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You don't have to take care of everything.
Chunk it: I know.

items.line_en: I used to do the same thing.

coach.say: I used to do the same thing.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I used to do the same thing.

items.line_en: If you feel sad, you know how to find me.

coach.say: If you feel sad, you know how to find me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: If you feel sad, / you know how to find me.
Chunk it: Yes?
Chunk it: Okay.

items.line_en: I fly past the sky every day.

coach.say: I fly past the sky every day.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I fly past the sky every day.

items.line_en: And I forgot to say hello.

coach.say: And I forgot to say hello.
coach.hint: Chunk it: And I forgot to say hello.
Chunk it: Hello.
Chunk it: 1 million kilometers.

items.line_en: I have seen this view one million times.

coach.say: I have seen this view one million times.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have seen this view one million times.
Chunk it: It is still beautiful.
Chunk it: I forgot it was beautiful.
Chunk it: It lands.
Chunk it: It always lands.
Chunk it: Easy now, / I've got you.
Chunk it: Lisa, / I still have it.
Chunk it: I know, / Peter.
Chunk it: It's safe.
Chunk it: You kept him awake?
Chunk it: Yes.
Chunk it: Good call.
Chunk it: Go home.
Chunk it: You work so / hard.

items.line_en: But you don't have to do it alone.

coach.say: But you don't have to do it alone.
coach.hint: Chunk it: But you don't have to do it alone.
Chunk it: Your dad is waiting.
Chunk it: Yes.
Chunk it: Sorry.
Chunk it: Don't be sorry.
Chunk it: Goodbye, / Lisa.
Chunk it: Goodbye, / Daniel.
Chunk it: I will remember.
Chunk it: Their dad was always waiting.
Chunk it: He was there.
Chunk it: Good flight.

items.line_en: You knew the whole time where I was.

coach.say: You knew the whole time where I was.
coach.hint: Chunk it: You knew the whole time where I was.
Chunk it: I just missed you.
Chunk it: I missed you too.
Chunk it: I know.
Chunk it: Mom, / take this.

items.line_en: Without this scarf, I cannot fly.

coach.say: Without this scarf, I cannot fly.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Without this scarf, / I cannot fly.

items.line_en: I will come home and get it.

coach.say: I will come home and get it.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I will come home and / get it.

items.line_en: How long before your next flight?

coach.say: How long before your next flight?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How long before your next flight?
Chunk it: Three hours.
Chunk it: Then we have time.
Chunk it: For what?
Chunk it: Food.
Chunk it: Real food.
Chunk it: Not chicken or / fish.

items.line_en: How did you know about chicken or fish?

coach.say: How did you know about chicken or fish?
coach.hint: Chunk it: How did you know about chicken or / fish?
Chunk it: You told me.
Chunk it: A long time ago.
Chunk it: You remembered.

items.line_en: I remember everything you tell me.

coach.say: I remember everything you tell me.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I remember everything you tell me.
Chunk it: Home is always there.
Chunk it: Mom, / yes.
Chunk it: I'm going to call more.
Chunk it: I know.
Chunk it: I mean it this time.
Chunk it: I know that too.
Chunk it: My name is Lisa.
Chunk it: I am a flight attendant.

items.line_en: I have been flying for 15 years.

coach.say: I have been flying for 15 years.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I have been flying for 15 years.
Chunk it: Today, / I stopped flying.

items.line_en: Today, I held a hand that was shaking.

coach.say: Today, I held a hand that was shaking.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Today, / I held a hand that was shaking.

items.line_en: Today, I saw where I was going.

coach.say: Today, I saw where I was going.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Today, / I saw where I was going.
